steps.title: Identify what 'initial deposit' means on the graph
steps.content: The initial deposit is the account balance at $x = 0$ months (when the account was opened). On the graph, that's the $y$-intercept of $f$.

steps.title: Read the value
steps.content:
From the graph, $f(0) \approx 15$ dollars.

The answer is 15.
